title: UN Demands Financial Reset
description: A UN trade agency says the global financial system needs an overhaul to support the real economy.
author: The Peel

title: Dollar Hits the Floor
description: The dollar slumped as fresh data strengthened expectations for Fed easing, keeping yen traders alert.
author: The Peel

title: Dollar Hits 4-Year Low
description: Dollar weakens as markets price Fed cut; equities at record high
author: The Peel

title: Charlie Kirk Assassinated
description: Conservative influencer, Charlie Kirk, shot dead in a 'political assassination.'
author: The Peel

title: Crude Prices Bounce
description: Oil futures had a rebound after increased tension between Russia and Ukraine.
author: The Peel

title: Nvidia Fever Builds
description: Markets reversed course, closing in positive territory as investors await Nvidia earnings tomorrow.
author: The Peel

title: Powell Fuels Market Surge
description: Fed Chair Powell signaled a possible September rate cut at Jackson Hole.
author: The Peel

title: Markets Keep Sliding
description: Markets continue to slide with big tech leading the way, with all eyes on the upcoming Fed Summit.
author: The Peel

title: Record Run Rolls On
description: July’s retail sales data, released on Friday, painted a still-healthy picture for the U.S consumer, rising last month, meeting expectations.
author: The Peel

title: Tariff Truce Extended
description: President Donald Trump extends the tariff truce between the U.S and China an additional 90 days.
author: The Peel

title: Revisions Wreck the Rally
description: Markets got sent into a tailspin after terrible July jobs data combined with steep revisions for May and June.
author: The Peel

title: July Fourth Set to Get Pricier
description: 💸 The Fourth of July could end up being the most expensive holiday for Americans.... Next year.
author: The Peel

title: Nvidia Delivers, AI Waits
description: 🌎Nvidia reported positive earnings after market close, meeting analyst estimates, but what does this mean for the future of AI infrastructure?
author: The Peel

title: Japan Faces Tariff Trouble
description: 🚗 Japan’s export machine stalls as U.S. tariffs hammer auto shipments—Tokyo calls it a “national crisis.”
author: The Peel

title: Market Catches Its Breath
description: 😎 The market took a bit of a breather after six straight days of taking straight W’s.
author: The Peel

title: Saudis Drop $600B Bag
description: 💰 The White House announced a $600 billion investment in the US from the Saudi government.
author: The Peel

title: Eggs Print Cash
description: 🥚 Cal-Maine cracks record profits as egg prices soar 90% amid fresh Avian Flu outbreak and DOJ scrutiny over industry pricing.
author: The Peel

title: Greg Abel Gets the Keys
description: ⛱️ Warren Buffett announced he will step down as Berkshire Hathaway CEO at year-end, naming Greg Abel as his successor.
author: The Peel

title: Americans Swipe Through the Gloom
description: 💳Americans swipe cards like pros—3.1% consumer spending rise, despite economic gloom!
author: The Peel

title: Nvidia Leads the Drop
description: 🧑‍💻 Mag 7 stocks, led by Nvidia, hit the hardest amid the selloff.
author: The Peel

title: Vista’s $1.5B Shale Grab
description: ⛽Vista takes a massive bite out of Argentina's Vaca Muerta with a $1.5B acquisition. Shale, anyone?
author: The Peel

title: Tech Gets Tariff Pass
description: 🤷‍♂️ Smartphones, computers, and other critical electronic products are now exempt from Trump’s tariffs.
author: The Peel

title: Stocks on Sale, Anyone Buying?
description: 📉 Stocks are trading at massive discounts, and some brave investors are dipping their toes back in.
author: The Peel

title: Small-Caps Slide Hard
description: 📉 Markets are seeing a whole lotta red, with small-cap stocks officially entering correction territory.
author: The Peel

title: CPI Drops, Fed Smiles (Maybe)
description: 👔 CPI surprisingly decreased and is getting even closer to the Fed’s 2% goal... for now.
author: The Peel

title: Markets Tease, Then Tank
description: 📉 The market extended declines for another day after giving investors brief hope.
author: The Peel

title: Boeing’s $20B Hack: Jets Over Planes
description: ✈️ Boeing secures a $20B jackpot—because if you can’t sell planes, sell fighter jets.
author: The Peel

title: Trade Deficit Sheds Pounds—For Now
description: 📉 America’s trade deficit goes on a diet—shedding $6.3B, but can it keep the weight off?
author: The Peel

title: Market Meltdowns? Bridgewater Thrives
description: 📊 Bridgewater thrives in chaos, racking up an 11.3% YTD gain—turns out market meltdowns are just another profit opportunity.
author: The Peel

title: Markets Rebound—For Real This Time?
description: Markets bounced back nicely to end the week, but is it enough to break the losing streak?​
author: The Peel

title: Goldman Waves the White Flag on the S&P
description: 🏦 Goldman Sachs is the first of the major banks to cut its annual S&P forecast.
author: The Peel

title: Dead Cat or Big Comeback?
description: 📈 US stocks are either in a dead cat bounce or are about to experience the most epic comeback of all time.
author: The Peel

title: U.S. Gov Wins (For Once)
description: 💰 You would never know it, but apparently, the U.S. government can get some things right. The second estimate of GDP growth in Q4’24 is out, and there’s not much good news.
author: The Peel

title: Housing Market: We Lost
description: 🔥 Alright, I’m throwing in the towel. Time to tap out, cry uncle, or whatever else you want to call it. The housing market wins, and it doesn’t appear poised for improvement.
author: The Peel

title: Inflation Fears Hit Consumer Mood
description: 🎭 Consumer sentiment nosedives as inflation fears rise, but is it just noise, or should the Fed actually care?
author: The Peel

title: Fed Debates Fixing the Mess
description: 🕜 To fix or not to fix, that’s the question facing JPow and the FOMC gang in the latest FOMC Minutes. Plus, a key policy tool came back into the conversation.
author: The Peel

title: Buying a House Just Got Worse
description: 🏘️ Sometimes, you just can’t win—especially if you’re trying to buy a house in the U.S. right now. Find out how January’s data made the situation even worse for buyers.
author: The Peel

title: Penny Costs More Than a Penny
description: 🪙 We can confirm—it costs more to make a penny than they’re worth. The same is true for nickels, and now, President Trump wants to put a stop to it.
author: The Peel

title: Taxation Is Theft, Tariffs Are Stealing
description: 🇺🇸 Taxation is theft, but tariffs are straight-up stealing... and it turns out they’re a damn good negotiating tactic too. Find out how doing nothing has already done something.
author: The Peel

title: America’s Honeymoon Is Over
description: 😞 The Honeymoon Period is over in America. Consumers are getting nervous now that economic changes that have been hyped up for four years are getting put in place.
author: The Peel

title: Amazon’s Never Heard of AI
description: 🎄 Amazon crushed it in Q4, and investors couldn’t have cared less. Find out below why the firm expects Q1 to be its weakest ever in revenue growth.
author: The Peel

title: Stablecoins: The Real Threat?
description: 🪙 Visa and Mastercard continued to rip off consumers and businesses alike in Q4. But, a quiet competitor overtook both giants in 2024, potentially ushering in a new future of payments.
author: The Peel

title: Dollar Flexes, Europe Sweats
description: 💪 The U.S. Dollar has been working out, eating right, and shooting enough steroids to give an elephant a six-pack. Find out why the rest of the world (*cough, Europe*) is tweaking.
author: The Peel

title: Ghosts in Washington
description: ⏱️ TikTok is ~72 days away from yet again facing a ban on American soil. Take a look at some of the Avengers that have assembled so far and their bids to buy.
author: The Peel

title: TikTok & Trump Are Back
description: 💃 TikTok is legal in America again... for the next 90-days. President Trump’s executive order stopped the ban from hitting this weekend, but the race is still on.
author: The Peel

title: CPI Report - “C” Is For “Confusing”
description: 💸 Inflation came in both higher and lower than expected. And everyone loved it. Find out why this particularly confusing CPI print sent markets soaring.
author: The Peel

title: All-Time Athletic Performance
description: 💼 Everyone in the U.S. had a 4.0 GPA and crushed their networking calls last month. Hiring went stupid as job additions came in >65% higher than expected.
author: The Peel

title: Nvidia CEO Kills Quantum’s Dream
description: 🌐 RIP to President Carter. And thanks for the day off. Anyway, on Wednesday, eBay shares ripped on a new partnership with Meta and Roku, which reminded Wall Street that it exists. Quantum stocks realized they have to make money and investors are selling anything close to the LA wildfires.
author: The Peel

title: Post-Holiday Spending Check
description: 🧱 As I scream into the void that is my wallet after the Holidays, I can’t help but wonder how the rest of America is doing. Find out below how the American consumer held up.
author: The Peel

title: U.S. Manufacturing Holds Steady
description: 🏭 The most boring week of the year is finally over. Find out how U.S. manufacturing held up in December and what to expect this week as we get back to reality.
author: The Peel

title: Nvidia Under Monopoly Probe
description: 💻 Nvidia dragged the market down on reports that the chipmaker is being investigated for violating anti-monopoly laws.
author: The Peel

title: Elon’s $56B Ego Check
description: ⚖️ A Delaware judge killed Elon Musk’s vibe, calling his $56 billion pay package “excessive” even after shareholders voted to approve it.
author: The Peel

title: “Somewhat Elevated,” Like My Stress Levels
description: 📈 The Fed Minutes are about as boring as they sound, but we went ahead and read it so you don’t have to. Find out what’s going on under the surface below.
author: The Peel

title: Analysts & Astrology: 2025 S&P 500 Price Targets
description: 🧠 Big brains at big banks are starting to drop their S&P 500 price targets for 2025. Find out what they expect and why it barely matters below.
author: The Peel

title: AI Spending Goes Brrr
description: 🌐 The only thing non-artificial about artificial intelligence is the ungodly amount of money companies are spending on this stuff. Find out what it means for the space below.
author: The Peel

title: Google’s Breakup Is Just Getting Started
description: 🌐 The Crowned Jewel of the Alphabet Empire is soon to be on the block if the DOJ gets its way. Find out how Step #1 of a potential breakup is set to go down.
author: The Peel

title: Liar, Liar, Shelter’s On Fire
description: 💲Much like global sea levels, inflation is rising again, but it’s really nothing to worry about. Find out what’s driving the uptick and why you can ignore it below.
author: The Peel

title: Santa Sleighs Stimulus Spending
description: 💸 Consumer spending remains strong according to BofA as consumers pivot from wasting money on themselves to wasting money on other people.
author: The Peel

title: “We Don’t Guess” JPow Mic Drops
description: 🫡 Like me from the JV basketball team, interest rates have been cut again. Markets loved the news and Powell’s comments—find out what he said below.
author: The Peel

title: 248yrs Later, We Still Got
description: 🏈 We just got the latest data on U.S. GDP. Growth is down, but spirits (and prices) are up. Find out what’s driving the gains and pains below.
author: The Peel

title: Betting Markets Predict Election Winner?
description: 🎲 The great American pastime of gambling can now be done on the great American tradition of violently heated elections. This is gonna be a fun week.
author: The Peel

title: Barbarians Are Back In PE
description: 💸🔥 Slim Shady said “Guess Who’s Back?” in Q3 with a new album, and so did private equity. Deals are so hot you might be able to take off that Patagonia vest.
author: The Peel

title: Just AIs Being Bots
description: This is downright weird. An ongoing experiment in which LLMs communicate with each other totally unmediated by humans has created bizarre outcomes, including a quarter billion dollar sh*tcoin and a new AI religion. Check out how we attempt to explain what the hell is going on below.
author: The Peel

title: What’s Up With Consumers?
description: Ahhh.... okay, now I see why consumer spending data is all over the place. Consumers themselves have no clue what to do in this environment, as we can see in the latest sentiment data. Check it out below.
author: The Peel

title: Elon’s CyberCap
description: Thursday evening, Tesla went HAM with their first major product announcement since the Cybertruck in 2019. The event went a helluva a lot better than that one, given that no one broke any windows, but we’ll see if this actually comes to fruition.
author: The Peel

title: Bankrupt With Billions
description: HBO just released a documentary claiming to have discovered BTC’s founder. They didn’t. But that got me thinking about what else is going on in the digital asset space, and it turns out that FTX investors are about to make a killing.
author: The Peel

title: Work-From-Port Is Back
description: The port strike is over... for now. This bandaid over a bullet hole will get us through the holiday and election season but bring us right back to where we were when the tentative deal expires on January 15th.
author: The Peel

title: Fire Every Economist
description: It’s high time we just eliminate the word “economist” from our lexicon. Or, at the very least, we could fire every economist because they’re consensus projections for September’s jobs report couldn’t have been more wrong. The U.S. labor market is thriving. Find out why below.
author: The Peel

title: Give Me Banana
description: The longshoremen strike has already been worse for my mental health than when I was dropped as a client by my therapist. And it’s only gonna get worse for the U.S. economy. Below, we go deep into exactly how and where all the shareholder value destruction will come from and what to expect for a resolution.
author: The Peel

title: We Can’t Have Nice Things
description: The economy is doing that annoying thing where everything seems almost too good. Inflation? Chillin’. Personal incomes? Getting fatter. Spending? Still going strong. But when things get too nice, you just know there’s a storm brewing.
author: The Peel

title: Fake Recessions
description: Tragic news, apes. Our beloved Bureau of Economic Analysis has fallen victim to the Fake News media. We just got our final GDP growth update for the second quarter, but that wasn’t even close to the biggest reveal of the data release. Get caught up on your economy below.
author: The Peel

title: Fed Cuts Rates
description: Happy belated Fed Rate Cut Day to all who celebrate. JPow turned back to JPump with the Fed’s decision to cut rates by 50bps yesterday, sending stocks higher. However, as usual, he killed the vibe when he opened his mouth. Scroll down to find out why.
author: The Peel

title: Get Hyped for Disappointment
description: The yield curve has been uninverted. Then, it inverted again, only to re-un-invert, followed by another inversion yesterday. I’m confused by that sentence, and I wrote the damn thing, so find out what’s really going on below.
author: The Peel

title: Nvidia Snubbed
description: The stock that cried earnings is back again, and... the market ain’t believing them anymore. Nvidia’s earnings blew the roof off once again, but it no longer impresses Wall Street. Get the full rundown below.
author: The Peel

title: McLaren Economy?
description: The U.S. economy is becoming more McLaren than Toyota. Yesterday’s Durable Goods report is the perfect example—it looks great on the outside but isn’t exactly something you want to invest in.
author: The Peel

title: M&M Pop-Tarts?
description: M&M flavored Pop-Tarts could be on their way to a store near you after this acquisition. UBS’s marriage with Credit Suisse is going well, but the Starbucks CEO transition isn’t as good as we thought. Finally, Chili’s needs our help.
author: The Peel

title: Nvidia’s Cash Boom
description: Nvidia cannot stop printing cash for investors, and it turns out that Robinhood has been a huge beneficiary, too. Meanwhile, B. Riley Financial collapsed under the weight of its own idiocy, and JetBlue joins Uncle Sam in a struggle to raise cash.
author: The Peel
